calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-05-2025 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Nov-21-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:40am and concluding at 9:41am.

Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc. appeared represented by George Amoyan via zoom.
Defendant Performing Solutions not appearing.

Witness Marc Ricards appeared via zoom.

Mr. Amoyan on behalf of the Plaintiff withdraws his 170.6 challenge to Judge Tong to have this matter heard today.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Creditor's Adjustment Bureau, Inc., and against Defendant Performing Solutions Inc. as follows:

Damages: $52,513.80
Prejudgment Interest: $4,460.90
Attorney Fees: $1,200.00
Costs: $665.57
Waiting Time Penalty: $

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $58,840.27

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2025 Continued To Dec-17-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2025 Continued To Sep-17-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
